creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: suspended->feedback

To submitter: Do you know if this is still a problem on newer versions 
of FreeBSD?  I suspect this has nothing to do with USB, but rather may 
be related to the Embedded Controller checking the status of batteries. 
Could you test to see if the peoblem still exists with newer versions 
of FreeBSD?  If it does still exist, can you test it with and without 
a battery installed, and also with or without the "Battery charge" and 
"power status" or similar applets running under X?  Thanks!
